name: Italian Meat Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large frying pan, heat butter and olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add chopped onions and sauté for one minute.
3. Add grated carrots, finely chopped celery, chopped mushrooms, and parsley. Cook, stirring frequently for 5 minutes.
4. Crumble the ground beef into the pan and cook, stirring frequently until lightly browned.
5. Sprinkle flour over the cooked ground beef and stir until well blended.
6. Stir in tomato puree.
7. Gradually add red wine to the mixture, stirring constantly.
8. Add beef broth and season with salt, pepper, oregano, and garlic as desired.
9. Simmer the sauce, stirring occasionally, for about 1 hour or until it has thickened.
10. Serve the meat sauce over pasta. Each serving is approximately 1 cup of sauce.
